title: frameworks
text: # Danny's frameworks

title: Invisibility Diagnostic (score posts 0-4)
text:
## Invisibility Diagnostic (score posts 0-4)
1. **Voice** — sounds like the person or like AI?
2. **POV** — real point of view or list of facts?
3. **Specificity** — names, numbers, dates, places?
4. **Asking** — reader asked to do, choose, or change something?

Below 3 = invisible. Rewrite. Built from 2,000+ social posts.

title: Personal brand = last moat
text:
## Personal brand = last moat
Only the founder's voice and POV cannot be cloned in an AI-commoditized world.

title: AI is a team, not a tool
text:
## AI is a team, not a tool
Seven roles: Content Strategist, Writer, Designer, Editor, Analyst, Prospector, DM Writer. Shared brand brief. Sequential work. Not one person typing into a box.

title: Content theatre vs pipeline
text:
## Content theatre vs pipeline
Likes are not the goal. Booked calls are. 1,000 likes and zero DMs = failed.

title: The 12-to-2 promise
text:
## The 12-to-2 promise
Compress marketing workflow from 12 hours/week to 2. That's the bar.

title: Outcome-first language
text:
## Outcome-first language
"Helped a founder" is meaningless. "0 to 10 inbound calls in 90 days" is real.

title: Built-in-public, sold-in-private
text:
## Built-in-public, sold-in-private
Workshop and teach in public. Sales in DMs or short calls.

title: Offer architecture
text:
## Offer architecture
- Big Promise with number + timeframe
- Risk reversal tied to result
- Speed: what ships in first session
- Stack: 3-5 named deliverables with outcomes each
- Scarcity that's real (capacity-based)

title: icp
text: # Ideal client profile

title: Who we serve
text:
## Who we serve
Solo founders and small business owners who are the face of their business.
- $100K–$5M ARR
- Service, knowledge, or coaching businesses
- Founder IS the brand
- Decision-maker and buyer in one person

title: Pains (their words)
text:
## Pains (their words)
- "My content gets likes but nobody books a call"
- "I'm paying for AI tools that aren't making me money"
- "I'm doing five jobs manually that AI could handle"
- "Every week I re-explain myself to a tool that should already know me"

title: What they want
text:
## What they want
- System that runs content marketing, not another tool to manage
- LinkedIn as client channel, not time drain
- Sound like themselves at scale
- Proof AI does more than save 10 minutes on an email

title: Disqualifiers
text:
## Disqualifiers
- Enterprise procurement cycles
- Non-founder employees
- Cheapest-option shoppers
- Anyone who wants to outsource their voice entirely

title: positioning
text: # Purely Personal — Positioning

title: One-line
text:
## One-line
Purely Personal builds the only non-replicable asset founders have left in an AI-commoditized world: their personal brand. We do it with AI-native content systems, not agency labour.

title: Category
text:
## Category
LinkedIn-first personal branding agency for founders, powered by AI content systems. Not a content agency. Not a ghostwriter. Not an AI consultant.

title: What we deliver
text:
## What we deliver
1. Voice DNA document for AI to write in their tone
2. ICP and positioning brief every skill reads from
3. Library of 5-10 Claude Skills (Strategist, Writer, Designer, Editor, Analyst, Prospector, DM Writer, Call Prep, Profile Optimizer, Repurposer)
4. 90-day content calendar mapped to business goals
5. Weekly two-hour production workflow replacing 12 hours of manual work

title: Three pillars
text:
## Three pillars
1. Personal brand is the last moat — voice and POV cannot be cloned.
2. AI is a team, not a tool — specialists with shared brief, not one chat box.
3. The system stays with the founder — no retainer trap.

title: Proof
text:
## Proof
- Taught AI and marketing to thousands of founders
- Monthly AI workshops with working outcomes by end of session
- Based in Finland, operating globally
- Founder-led: every asset tested on our own business first
